description: A health informatics specialist needs to create a new concept map type to support terminology mapping between the hospital's local concept dictionary and ICD-11. Create a new concept map type named 'ASSOCIATED-WITH' with the description 'Indicates that a concept is clinically associated with a concept in an external terminology system'. Ensure the map type is not hidden. Access the OpenMRS administration panel at https://localhost/openmrs/admin using username 'superman' and password 'Admin123'.
